criteria.text: Multi-owner board: TASKS_TEAM_USERS set + app creds -> GET /api/tasks returns {multiOwner:true, owners[]} per configured UPN, app-only Tasks.Read.All, grouped server-side by real owner (no hardcoded DCR), sorted overdue->open
Single-user fallback preserved: no team configured -> GET /api/tasks returns {multiOwner:false, tasks[]} delegated own To Do; additive multiOwner discriminator only shape change
Frontend renders both shapes: per-owner cards (fixed-height scrollable) for multiOwner:true, single list for false, no crash on either
Owner resolution + isolation: UPN resolves to {id,name} via User.ReadBasic.All, cached per-user (no cross-owner bleed), unreadable/not-found owner skipped not fatal
HIPAA audit: reading an owner tasks records who/what(source=tasks,owner id/upn)/when/where(route)/outcome, never task titles or PHI values
PHI-safe logging: error on tasks path logs owner id/route/status, never task titles or content
Offline gate: FIXTURES_DIR multi-owner To Do fixtures pin both DTO variants through live route+transform path, no network/creds, demo path absent
